auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants (Aaron Keetley, CPA, CMA, CA)
one_time_description: Subsequent event: ISC accepted relief request and forgave $928,027 of $1,329,700 owed by Gitsegukla First Nation (July 24, 2020)
economic_notes: Investment of $110 in BCFN GRS GP Inc. (<1% interest). Economic dependence on ISC and First Nations Health Authority. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with potential negative operational impacts.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Consolidates 1111940 Limited Partnership and 1111940 British Columbia Ltd. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond partner names and location (Port Coquitlam, BC). Deferred revenue was $1,436,477 in prior year but $0 in 2020. Subsequent event: ISC forgave $928,027 of debt after year-end. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event. Accumulated surplus per Statement 2 is $20,473,305 but Note 11 shows $20,467,793 — minor discrepancy likely due to rounding or trust fund treatment. Capital lease of $46,529 excluded from long_term_debt figure which shows only term/demand loans. expenses_enterprises mapped to Economic Development.
